2603.19739.title: MOSS-TTSD: Text to Spoken Dialogue Generation
2603.19739.paper_summary: Spoken dialogue generation is crucial for applications like podcasts, dynamic commentary, and entertainment content, but poses significant challenges compared to single-utterance text-to-speech (TTS). Key requirements include accurate turn-taking, cross-turn acoustic consistency, and long-form stability, which current models often fail to address due to a lack of dialogue context modeling. To bridge this gap, we present MOSS-TTSD, a spoken dialogue synthesis model designed for expressive, multi-party conversational speech across multiple languages. With enhanced long-context modeling, MOSS-TTSD generates long-form spoken conversations from dialogue scripts with explicit speaker tags, supporting up to 60 minutes of single-pass synthesis, multi-party dialogue with up to 5 speakers, and zero-shot voice cloning from a short reference audio clip. The model supports various mainstream languages, including English and Chinese, and is adapted to several long-form scenarios. Additionally, to address limitations of existing evaluation methods, we propose TTSD-eval, an objective evaluation framework based on forced alignment that measures speaker attribution accuracy and speaker similarity without relying on speaker diarization tools. Both objective and subjective evaluation results show that MOSS-TTSD surpasses strong open-source and proprietary baselines in dialogue synthesis.
2603.19739.paper_summary_zh: 口語對話生成對於播客、動態評論和娛樂內容等應用至關重要，但與單次發話的文本轉語音（TTS）相比，面臨著重大挑戰。關鍵要求包括準確的輪流發言、跨輪次的聲學一致性和長期穩定性，而目前的模型往往無法解決這些問題，因為缺乏對話上下文建模。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了 MOSS-TTSD，一種旨在生成富有表現力的多方對話語音的口語對話合成模型，支持多種語言。通過增強的長期上下文建模，MOSS-TTSD 能夠從帶有明確說話者標籤的對話腳本中生成長篇口語對話，支持最多 60 分鐘的單次合成、最多 5 位說話者的多方對話，以及從短的參考音頻片段進行零樣本語音克隆。該模型支持多種主流語言，包括英語和中文，並適應多種長篇場景。此外，為了解決現有評估方法的局限性，我們提出了 TTSD-eval，一種基於強制對齊的客觀評估框架，測量說話者歸屬準確性和說話者相似性，而無需依賴說話者分離工具。客觀和主觀的評估結果均顯示，MOSS-TTSD 在對話合成方面超越了強大的開源和專有基準。
2603.19739.author: Yuqian Zhang et.al.
2603.19739.authors: Yuqian Zhang, Donghua Yu, Zhengyuan Lin, Botian Jiang, Mingshu Chen, Yaozhou Jiang, Yiwei Zhao, Yiyang Zhang, Yucheng Yuan, Hanfu Chen, Kexin Huang, Jun Zhan, Cheng Chang, Zhaoye Fei, Shimin Li, Xiaogui Yang, Qinyuan Cheng, Xipeng Qiu
